name: RC High-Pass Filter
description: First-order RC high-pass filter. Passes frequencies above fc, attenuates below. fc = 1/(2πRC). Capacitor blocks DC and low frequencies. Resistor provides load path to ground.
notes: fc = 1/(2π×R1×C1). R1=10kΩ, C1=10nF: fc ≈ 1.59kHz. Below fc, output rolls off at −20dB/decade. Used for AC coupling, rumble filtering, blocking DC offset. Complement to low-pass filter.

components.notes: Series capacitor — blocks DC and low freq
